summary_context: Successfully merged the dailyReport branch into the integration branch. In response to user feedback, restored the mobile DailyReportEntryModal.tsx and create.tsx to match the dailyReport branch 100% exactly. Resolved strict TypeScript compilation errors caused by this restoration by updating the frontend DailyReportEntry interface to support optional startTime, endTime, and hours properties, satisfying tsc --noEmit. Resolved several Next.js build-blocking linter errors (unescaped quotes, const declarations, empty catch blocks) to make the production build clean. synched the code, ran final type checks, committed, and pushed the updated integration branch to origin/integration.
